# Let's open the provided files and search for related content.
import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, math, itertools
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadiths)[:3], type(hadiths)
type(quran), len(quran), type(hadiths)
quran[:1], hadiths[:1]

import re, unicodedata

# Define normalization functions
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = re.compile(r"[\u0640]")
PUNCT = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")  # remove punctuation except Arabic letters/digits/underscore
SPACES = re.compile(r"\s+")

def normalize_hamza(text):
    # Map hamza forms to base letters
    text = text.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    text = text.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ٔ","").replace("ء","")
    text = text.replace("ٱ","ا")  # alif wasla to alif
    return text

def normalize_text(text):
    # NFKC Unicode normalization
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFKC", text)
    text = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", text)
    text = TATWEEL.sub("", text)
    text = normalize_hamza(text)
    # Replace Arabic numerals to ascii optional? not needed
    # Remove punctuation
    text = PUNCT.sub(" ", text)
    # Collapse spaces and strip
    text = SPACES.sub(" ", text).strip()
    return text

full_span = "وَعَدَكُمُ اللَّهُ فَضْلًا عَظِيمًا مَّن لَّمّا سَكَتَ السَّحَرَةُ فَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ ثَقِفًا"
snippet = "وَعَدَكُمُ...مْ ثَقِفًا"  # Provided_Span_Snippet - not useful; but we'll try normalized of extracted content (without ellipsis)
full_norm = normalize_text(full_span)
snippet_norm = normalize_text(snippet)
full_norm, snippet_norm

# Build normalized ayah_text for each quran entry
for ay in quran:
    t = ay["ayah_text"]
    ay["ayah_text_norm"] = normalize_text(t)

# Gather occurrences for tokens
def search_token(token):
    token_norm = normalize_text(token)
    return [ay for ay in quran if token_norm in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]

occ_wadakum = search_token("وعدكم")
occ_sahara = search_token("السحرة")
occ_fajaalnakum = search_token("فجعلناكم")

len(occ_wadakum), len(occ_sahara), len(occ_fajaalnakum)
[(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in occ_wadakum]
[(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in occ_sahara]
[ay for ay in quran if "فجعلناكم" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]
[(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in quran if "جعلناكم" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]
[(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in quran if "ثقف" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]

# Build candidate set of ayahs overlapping with tokens in full span
candidates = { (ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id']): ay for ay in itertools.chain(
    occ_wadakum,
    occ_sahara,
    [ay for ay in quran if "جعلناكم" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]],
    [ay for ay in quran if "ثقف" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]],
) }.values()

len(candidates)

def sim_with_full(ay):
    s = compute_similarity(full_span, ay["ayah_text"])
    s["ayah_text"] = ay["ayah_text"]
    s["surah"] = ay["surah_name"]
    s["ayah_id"] = ay["ayah_id"]
    return s

sims = [sim_with_full(ay) for ay in candidates]
# Sort by avg of lcs and f1
for d in sims:
    d["avg"] = (d["lcs"] + d["f1"])/2
sorted_sims = sorted(sims, key=lambda x: x["avg"], reverse=True)
sorted_sims[:10]

# Search for exact phrase "فضلا عظيما" in Qur'an
matches_fadlan = [ay for ay in quran if "فَضْلًا عَظِيمًا" in ay["ayah_text"] or "فَضْلًا عَظِيمًا" in ay["ayah_text"].replace(" ", "")]
len(matches_fadlan), [(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in matches_fadlan[:10]]

matches_fadlan_norm = [ay for ay in quran if "فضلا عظيما" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]
len(matches_fadlan_norm), [(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in matches_fadlan_norm[:10]]

matches_fadl = [ay for ay in quran if "فضلا" in ay["ayah_text_norm"]]
len(matches_fadl), [(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id']) for ay in matches_fadl[:20]]
[(ay['surah_name'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for ay in matches_fadl]
[(h["hadithID"], h["title"], h["text"][:200]) for h in search_hadith("وعدكم الله")[:5]]

h = search_hadith("وعدكم الله")[0]
h["text"]

# Compute similarity of full span vs all Quran ayahs
def best_matches_quran(full_span, topn=10):
    sims = []
    for ay in quran:
        s = compute_similarity(full_span, ay["ayah_text"])
        s["surah"] = ay["surah_name"]
        s["ayah_id"] = ay["ayah_id"]
        s["ayah_text"] = ay["ayah_text"]
        s["avg"] = (s["lcs"] + s["f1"])/2
        sims.append(s)
    sims.sort(key=lambda x: x["avg"], reverse=True)
    return sims[:topn]

best_quran = best_matches_quran(full_span, topn=10)
[(s["avg"], s["lcs"], s["f1"], s["surah"], s["ayah_id"], s["ayah_text"]) for s in best_quran]

# Compose combined candidate from 4 ayahs
c1 = next(ay for ay in quran if ay["surah_name"]=="الفتح" and ay["ayah_id"]==20)["ayah_text"]
c2 = next(ay for ay in quran if ay["surah_name"]=="الأعراف" and ay["ayah_id"]==120)["ayah_text"]
c3 = next(ay for ay in quran if ay["surah_name"]=="البقرة" and ay["ayah_id"]==143)["ayah_text"]
c4 = next(ay for ay in quran if ay["surah_name"]=="البقرة" and ay["ayah_id"]==191)["ayah_text"]

combined = c1 + " " + c2 + " " + c3 + " " + c4
compute_similarity(full_span, combined)
len(search_hadith("فضلا عظيما")), len(search_hadith("سجد السحرة")), len(search_hadith("سكت السحرة"))
